Global (All).title: China Condemned Russia's Annexation of Donetsk, Luhansk
Global (All).summary: China has condemned Russia's annexation of Donetsk and Luhansk, amid escalating tensions in Ukraine

Global (All).title: Ukraine Recaptures Village in Luhansk
Global (All).summary: Ukrainian forces have recaptured a village in Luhansk, as Russia's annexation of the region continues to escalate tensions

Global (All).title: Rise in Migrant Arrivals in Greece Amid EU-Morocco Deal
Global (All).summary: The number of migrant arrivals in Greece has increased following an EU-Morocco deal aimed at reducing migration across the Mediterranean

United States.title: US Supreme Court rules in favor of gun rights in major decision
United States.summary: A divided US Supreme Court on Thursday handed down a major ruling that expands the ability of Americans to carry concealed handguns in public, ruling that the Constitution protects an individual's right to carry a gun outside the home in most circumstances.

United States.title: Biden Administration announces new sanctions against Russian officials
United States.summary: The US Department of the Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) on Wednesday announced new sanctions against Russian officials and entities in response to Russia's alleged interference in the 2022 US midterm elections.

United States.title: US Congress holds hearing on January 6th Committee Report
United States.summary: The US House Committee on Oversight and Accountability held a hearing on Wednesday to discuss the findings of the January 6th Committee Report, which detailed the events leading up to the January 6, 2021, attack on the US Capitol.

South Korea.title: South Korean military stages anti-submarine exercise near disputed islets after North Korea's naval provocation
South Korea.summary: South Korea's military staged an anti-submarine exercise near disputed islets on Sunday, days after North Korea conducted a naval provocation in the area. The operation involved naval vessels, helicopters, and divers conducting exercises near the islets, which are also claimed by Japan. Seoul's defense ministry said the exercises were aimed at enhancing interoperability and response capabilities in the event of a naval provocation by North Korea.

South Korea.title: Samsung Electronics faces potential data breach lawsuit in South Korea
South Korea.summary: Samsung Electronics faces the possibility of a lawsuit in South Korea over a potential data breach that may have compromised the sensitive information of over 20,000 customers. The electronics giant has acknowledged that a data leak occurred, but has yet to confirm the extent of the breach.

South Korea.title: South Korea reports 5,000 new COVID-19 cases as Omicron continues to spread
South Korea.summary: South Korea reported over 5,000 new COVID-19 cases on Friday, a slight increase from the previous day's tally. The country's government has reimposed some social distancing measures to mitigate the spread of the virus, but the economy has been affected by the ongoing pandemic.

Japan.title: Kyoto's mayor quits over funding probe,
Japan.summary: The mayor of Kyoto has resigned after being investigated for possible breaches of election campaign finance laws. The probe is seen as emblematic of Japan’s ongoing struggles with transparency and accountability in politics.

Japan.title: Japanese government says it can't track 1,000 asylum seekers
Japan.summary: The Japanese government has admitted it cannot track the whereabouts of over 1,000 asylum seekers, sparking concerns about national security and the rule of law. The revelation has put a spotlight on Japan's asylum system and its handling of migrants.

Japan.title: North Korea claims to have test-fired hypersonic missile,
Japan.summary: North Korea has claimed to have successfully tested a new hypersonic missile, which has been interpreted as a threat to regional security and a challenge to the United States' nuclear deterrence policies.
